purpose: Common field definitions shared across all schema families. mvp_status references the canonical Decision Closure status enum. Scaffold-local shorthand (mvp / deferred / placeholder) is not preserved as canonical.

commonFields.source: Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy (Required Common Fields)
commonFields.description: Stable identifier for the family record. Format is per-family.
commonFields.notes: Required on every record across all 14 families.

commonFields.description: Discriminator naming the schema family. Constrained per family by the family schema.
commonFields.notes: Bound to the family-name set: template-manifest, enums, settings, permissions, site, pages, libraries, lists, modules, workflows, integrations, site-health, provisioning-validation, validation-rules.

commonFields.source: Standard Project Site Template Contract §22; Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy; VR-24
commonFields.description: Decision Closure Register status. Bound to the canonical four-value enum.
commonFields.notes: Allowed values: Frozen for MVP, Runtime Configuration, Deferred, Proof-Gated.

commonFields.source: Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy (Required Common Fields)
commonFields.description: Anchor in the Standard Project Site Template Contract justifying the record. Phase 1 schemas with missing sourceContractSection fail validation.
Object Catalog ID (§4A) row identifier the record traces to.
commonFields.notes: Required when the record corresponds to a §4A row; otherwise optional.

commonFields.description: Anchor in the HB Project Control Center Target Architecture Blueprint when applicable.
commonFields.notes: Optional; populated when the family is also referenced by the Blueprint.

commonFields.description: Reference to the Decision Closure Register entry (D-, P-, R- code) that closed the relevant decision.
commonFields.notes: Optional; populated when a decision-register entry directly governs the field.

commonFields.source: Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy; Phase 0 Step 2 Validation Rule Table Plan
commonFields.description: Array of Validation Rule IDs (e.g., VR-01) that bind to the record.
commonFields.notes: Optional but recommended on every record that participates in a validation rule.

commonFields.description: Category of owner responsible for the record (e.g., HB Intel Architecture, PCC Admin, IT/Integration Admin).
commonFields.notes: Optional; populated where ownership is contract-bound.
